---
name: New entry (tool / paper / person / lab)
about: Propose an addition to data/*.yml — or better, open the two-line PR yourself
labels: data
---

**Which file:** data/tools.yml · data/papers.yml · data/community.yml

**Entry (paste the YAML):**

```yaml
- name:
  url:
  blurb:   # one non-hypey sentence, <=220 chars
  tier:    # gold|silver|bronze|watch or survivor|young — justify below
  category:
```

**Evidence for the tier** (the three-window rule — dates, stars, survival probes; no evidence ⇒ no entry):
